topic.description: Legislation aimed at improving public health through community programs and regulations.

Document 1: establish a community-based overweight and obesity prevention program
award grants to eligible entities to plan and implement evidence-based programs
Document 2: require prescription drug packaging to incorporate radio frequency tagging technology
prohibit such technologies from containing or transmitting any identifying information
Document 3: amends the Missing Children's Assistance Act
definition of 'missing child' includes those removed in violation of law

topic.name: Health Technology and Infrastructure
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislative efforts to enhance health technology, rehabilitation services, and infrastructure development related to health and medical services.

Document 1: redevelop the Department of Energy (DOE) Forrestal Complex
facilitate the redevelopment of Maryland Avenue, Southwest
Document 2: cover complex rehabilitation technology items designed and configured for a specific qualified individual
establish eligibility criteria for them
Document 3: exempt certain software from requirements for medical devices
report on the health risks and benefits associated with exempted software

topic.name: Aquatic and Environmental Policy
topic.description: This topic encompasses regulations and actions aimed at managing aquatic ecosystems, preventing invasive species, and supporting conservation efforts in North America.

Document 1: prevent the introduction or establishment of a population of aquatic nuisance species
prepare an economic impact statement regarding the impact on commerce and commercial activity
Document 2: authorizes the Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating
limits authorized coastwise trade for each vessel to the carriage of natural gas
Document 3: amends the North American Wetlands Conservation Act
allow the non-federal share of the U.S. contribution to the costs of wetlands conservation projects carried out in Canada

topic.name: Emergency Assistance and Coordination
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislative measures aimed at providing emergency assistance and coordination for public safety and disaster response.

Document 1: provides emergency conservation program assistance
assistance to agricultural producers in qualifying counties adversely affected by Hurricane Irene
Document 2: establish a national Silver Alert communications network
assist regional and local search efforts for missing seniors
Document 3: amends the Delta Development Act
includes Vernon and Sabine Parishes of Louisiana within the Lower Mississippi Delta region

topic.name: Government Accountability and Reporting
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislative acts focused on enhancing accountability and reporting requirements for various government agencies and officials.

Document 1: Directs the President to submit annual counterterrorism reports to the appropriate congressional committees
assessment of U.S. counterterrorism efforts in fighting Al Qaeda and its related affiliates.
Document 2: Directs the Inspector General (IG) of the Federal Housing Finance Agency to submit quarterly reports to Congress
on the IG's activities with respect to the Federal National Mortgage Association (Fannie Mae) and the Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation (Freddie Mac)
Document 3: Requires the Surgeon General to submit to Congress and make publicly available an annual report on the state of the nation's health.
Directs the Surgeon General to issue reports, calls to action, and other communications on matters of importance to the health of the American people.

topic.name: Government Credentialing and Education Policies
topic.description: This cluster addresses legislative measures related to government credentialing processes and educational policies aimed at improving school discipline and student outcomes.

Document 1: establish the APEC Business Travel Program to issue Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation Business Travel Cards (ABTCs)
integrate application procedures for and issuance of ABTCs with other international registered traveler programs
Document 2: require state school improvement plans to contain assurances that the state will work with other education stakeholders to reduce suspensions and expulsions
actions the LEA will take to reduce suspensions and expulsions
Document 3: prohibits the Government Publishing Office from assembling or manufacturing any secure credentials
secure credential is defined as an identification document that includes component security parts designed to authenticate the document

topic.name: Legislative Amendments and Regulations
topic.description: The documents discuss various legislative amendments and regulations related to federal programs, tax administration, and educational standards.

Document 1: Directs the Commandant of the Coast Guard to modify...
the United States shall retain ownership of the Lens.
Document 2: Amends the Internal Revenue Code to eliminate certain payment requirements...
Authorize the Secretary of the Treasury to make an apology payment to a taxpayer.
Document 3: This bill amends the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965...
allow a state to withdraw from the Common Core State Standards.

topic.name: Land Use and Management Legislation
topic.description: Legislation focused on land use, management, and allocation, particularly concerning grazing permits and Native land allotments.

Document 1: Directs the Secretary of Agriculture (USDA) or the Secretary of the Interior to accept and terminate any grazing permit or lease that is waived by a grazing permittee or lessee.
Ensure a permanent end to livestock grazing on such allotment.
Document 2: Amends provisions of the Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act (ANCSA) that allow certain Alaska Native Vietnam veterans to file for allotments of up to two parcels of federal land.
Allows allotments to be selected from vacant federal lands or lands that have been selected or conveyed to the state of Alaska or a Native Corporation.
